    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    E

    email - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.InviteRequest
    Email address of the person being invited.
    email - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.UserLoginRequest
    Email address used to identify the user account.
    email - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.UserRegisterRequest
    Email address of the new account.
    email - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.UserResponse
    Login email address of the user.
    email - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.User
    Unique email address used for login and invitations.
    endDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    Last day of the vacation period (inclusive).
    endDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Last day of the configured vacation period.
    endDate - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    Last day of the vacation period (inclusive).
    EnergyDashboardResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Aggregated energy consumption dashboard for a user (FR-14).
    EnergyDashboardResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse
    Creates an empty dashboard response; fields are populated by the service layer.
    EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Per-device energy summary.
    EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Per-room aggregated energy summary.
    EnergyLog - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    A periodic energy consumption record for a device (FR-14).
    EnergyLog() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.EnergyLog
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    EnergyLogMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps EnergyLog entities to response DTOs.
    EnergyLogRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for EnergyLog entities.
    EnergyLogRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.EnergyLogRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    EnergyLogRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for manually recording an energy consumption entry (for testing / FR-14).
    EnergyLogRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.EnergyLogRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    EnergyLogResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a single energy log entry.
    EnergyLogResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    EnergyResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for energy consumption tracking and the dashboard (FR-14, FR-16).
    EnergyResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.EnergyResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    equals(Object) - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Gibt an, ob ein anderes Objekt diesem gleich ("equal to") ist.
    equals(Object) - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Gibt an, ob ein anderes Objekt diesem gleich ("equal to") ist.
    equals(Object) - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.websocket.DeviceEventBroadcaster.DeviceStateMessage
    Gibt an, ob ein anderes Objekt diesem gleich ("equal to") ist.
    evaluateRulesForDevice(Device) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.service.RuleEngineService
    Evaluates all active EVENT and THRESHOLD rules whose trigger device matches the given device.
    EVENT - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.TriggerType
    Fires when a device changes to a specific state.
    eventType() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceEvent
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente eventType zurück.
    exportCsv(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ActivityLogResource
    Exports the activity log as a CSV file (FR-16).
    exportCsv(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.EnergyResource
    Exports the energy consumption summary as a CSV file (FR-16).
